name: Paneer Tikka
description: Classic tandoor-grilled cottage cheese cubes marinated in spiced yogurt and mustard oil.

name: Chicken 65
description: Spicy, deep-fried chicken bites flavored with curry leaves, ginger, and red chillies.

name: Hara Bhara Kebab
description: Healthy spinach and green pea patties shallow-fried with aromatic Indian spices.

name: Fish Amritsari
description: Carom-flavored crispy fried fish, a legendary street food favorite from Punjab.

name: Dahi Ke Sholey
description: Bread rolls stuffed with creamy hung curd and bell peppers, deep-fried to golden perfection.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Soft cottage cheese in a rich, buttery tomato gravy finished with fresh cream.

name: Dal Makhani
description: Creamy black lentils slow-cooked overnight with butter, cream, and a touch of smoky flavor.

name: Malai Kofta
description: Potato and paneer dumplings served in a mild, sweet, and nutty cashew-based gravy.

name: Baingan Bharta
description: Smoky fire-roasted eggplant mashed and tempered with onions, tomatoes, and green peas.

name: Palak Paneer
description: Fresh spinach puree cooked with cubes of cottage cheese and a hint of garlic.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Tandoori chicken pieces simmered in a velvety smooth tomato, butter, and cream sauce.

name: Mutton Rogan Josh
description: Tender pieces of lamb slow-cooked in an aromatic gravy of Kashmiri red chillies and saffron.

name: Chicken Chettinad
description: Fiery and flavorful South Indian chicken curry made with a blend of 16 fresh spices.

name: Goan Fish Curry
description: Fresh fish steaks simmered in a tangy and spicy coconut milk gravy with tamarind.

name: Hyderabadi Chicken Dum Biryani
description: Fragrant long-grain basmati rice layered with marinated chicken, cooked on 'dum' for maximum flavor.

name: Veg Lucknowi Biryani
description: An aromatic Awadhi delicacy of rice and seasonal vegetables cooked in a sealed pot.

name: Jeera Rice
description: Steamed basmati rice tempered with cumin seeds and a hint of desi ghee.

name: Butter Naan
description: Soft and fluffy leavened bread baked in a clay oven and brushed with pure butter.

name: Lacha Paratha
description: Multi-layered whole wheat bread baked in a tandoor with a crispy outer finish.

name: Pani Puri
description: Crispy hollow puris filled with spiced potatoes and tangy, spicy mint water.

name: Pav Bhaji
description: A thick spicy vegetable mash served with buttery toasted bread rolls and onions.

name: Vada Pav
description: The quintessential Mumbai street burger—spiced potato fritter in a soft bun with chutneys.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Warm milk-based dumplings soaked in a rose-scented sugar syrup.

name: Rasmalai
description: Soft cottage cheese discs immersed in a chilled, thickened milk flavored with saffron.

name: Mango Lassi
description: A refreshing yogurt-based drink blended with sweet Alphonso mangoes and cardamom.

name: Masala Chai
description: Traditional Indian tea brewed with milk, fresh ginger, and an aromatic spice blend.
